title: Natural Remedies for Indigestion: 10 Best Herbal Teas
description: Cinnamomum verum tea, also known as Ceylon cinnamon, has been used for centuries to help with indigestion. The tea is made from the bark of the Ceylon cinnamon tree, which contains a chemical called cinnamaldehyde. This chemical helps to ease stomach upset by reducing inflammation and killing bacteria that can cause indigestion. When you drink Cinnamomum verum tea, the cinnamaldehyde is absorbed into your bloodstream and reaches your stomach, where it helps to soothe the lining and red...
